description: Component-driven boundaries for gateway enhancements. Prefer extending a component before introducing microservices.

components.label: Gateway API router
components.notes: Core OpenAI-compatible surface; keep monolithic until independent scaling or team boundary is proven.

components.label: Authz and audit
components.notes: Cross-cutting; must stay consistent across all routes.

components.label: Control-center UI
components.notes: Static operator surface; component partials per console.

components.label: Governance inventory
components.notes: Source-of-truth docs; required for every slice.

components.label: Validation and smoke
components.notes: Quality gates stay colocated with the monolith until service split.

components.label: Flow orchestration studio
components.notes: Candidate for extraction if workflow engine needs independent deploy cadence or GPU isolation.

microservice_triggers: Independent scaling requirement (CPU/GPU/memory) with clear API boundary
Different release cadence or blast-radius isolation mandated by CISO
Team ownership split with stable contract already defined in API inventory
Regulatory boundary requiring separate audit domain
microservice_anti_patterns: Splitting before API inventory marks a stable contract
Extracting without observability, rollback, and dual-approval parity
Creating network hops for synchronous operator CRUD without caching strategy
